sentences.target: Wir dekorieren den Kuchen mit Erdbeeren.

translations.de: Wir dekorieren den Kuchen mit Erdbeeren.
translations.en: We’re decorating the cake with strawberries.
translations.es: Estamos decorando el pastel con fresas.
translations.fr: On décore le gâteau avec des fraises.
translations.it: Stiamo decorando la torta con le fragole.
translations.yue: 我哋用士多啤梨嚟裝飾個蛋糕。
translations.pt: Estamos decorando o bolo com morangos.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang trang trí bánh với dâu tây.
translations.nl: We versieren de taart met aardbeien.
translations.hi: हम स्ट्रॉबेरी से केक सजा रहे हैं।
translations.ja: いちごでケーキを飾っています。

tokens.explanation: 1st person plural personal pronoun in nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; transitive predicate selecting a direct object.
Definite article, accusative masculine singular; marks the direct object ‘Kuchen’.
Common noun, masculine; accusative singular as the direct object of ‘dekorieren’.
Preposition ‘mit’ governing the dative; introduces an instrumental/comitative phrase.
Common noun, plural; dative plural as the object of ‘mit’ (no article).

sentences.target: Die Kinder dekorieren den Klassenraum mit Papier.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈkɪndɐ dekoˈʁiːʁən deːn ˈklasnʁaʊ̯m mɪt paˈpiːɐ̯/

translations.de: Die Kinder dekorieren den Klassenraum mit Papier.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈkɪndɐ dekoˈʁiːʁən deːn ˈklasnʁaʊ̯m mɪt paˈpiːɐ̯/
translations.en: The kids are decorating the classroom with paper.
translations.es: Los niños están decorando el aula con papel.
translations.fr: Les enfants décorent la salle de classe avec du papier.
translations.it: I bambini stanno decorando l’aula con della carta.
translations.yue: 小朋友用紙嚟佈置課室。
translations.pt: As crianças estão decorando a sala de aula com papel.
translations.vi: Bọn trẻ đang trang trí lớp học bằng giấy.
translations.nl: De kinderen versieren het klaslokaal met papier.
translations.hu: A gyerekek papírral díszítik az osztálytermet.
translations.hi: बच्चे कागज़ से कक्षा सजा रहे हैं।
translations.el: Τα παιδιά διακοσμούν την τάξη με χαρτί.
translations.ro: Copiii decorează sala de clasă cu hârtie.
translations.ja: 子どもたちが紙で教室を飾っています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative plural; determiners the subject noun ‘Kinder’.
Common noun, plural; nominative plural subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural; agrees with ‘Die Kinder’.
Definite article, accusative masculine singular; marks the direct object ‘Klassenraum’.
Common noun, masculine; accusative singular direct object of ‘dekorieren’.
Preposition governing the dative; introduces a means/material phrase.
Common noun, neuter; dative singular as the object of ‘mit’.

sentences.target: Sie dekorieren das Wohnzimmer für die Party.
sentences.reading: /ziː dekoˈʁiːʁən das ˈvoːnˌtsɪmɐ fyːɐ̯ diː ˈpaʁti/

translations.de: Sie dekorieren das Wohnzimmer für die Party.
translations.ipa: /ziː dekoˈʁiːʁən das ˈvoːnˌtsɪmɐ fyːɐ̯ diː ˈpaʁti/
translations.en: They’re decorating the living room for the party.
translations.es: Están decorando el salón para la fiesta.
translations.fr: Ils décorent le salon pour la fête.
translations.it: Stanno decorando il soggiorno per la festa.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们正在为派对布置客厅。
translations.pt: Eles estão decorando a sala de estar para a festa.
translations.vi: Họ đang trang trí phòng khách cho bữa tiệc.
translations.nl: Ze versieren de woonkamer voor het feest.
translations.hi: वे पार्टी के लिए बैठक का कमरा सजा रहे हैं।
translations.el: Διακοσμούν το σαλόνι για το πάρτι.
translations.id: Mereka menghias ruang tamu untuk pesta.
translations.ja: パーティーのためにリビングを飾っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in nominative; ambiguous between 3rd person plural ‘they’ and 2nd person formal ‘you’ (capitalized at sentence start).
Finite main verb, present indicative; agrees with ‘Sie’ (3rd pl or 2nd person formal).
Definite article, accusative neuter singular; marks the direct object ‘Wohnzimmer’.
Common noun, neuter; accusative singular direct object of ‘dekorieren’.
Preposition ‘für’ governing the accusative; introduces a purpose/beneficiary phrase.
Definite article, accusative feminine singular; with ‘Party’ as object of ‘für’.
Common noun, feminine (loanword); accusative singular object of ‘für’.

sentences.target: Wir dekorieren gerade den Balkon mit Lichterketten.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ dekoˈʁiːʁən ɡəˈʁaːdə deːn balˈkɔŋ mɪt ˈlɪçtɐˌkɛtən/

translations.de: Wir dekorieren gerade den Balkon mit Lichterketten.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ dekoˈʁiːʁən ɡəˈʁaːdə deːn balˈkɔŋ mɪt ˈlɪçtɐˌkɛtən/
translations.en: We’re decorating the balcony with string lights.
translations.es: Estamos decorando el balcón con guirnaldas de luces.
translations.fr: On décore le balcon avec des guirlandes lumineuses.
translations.it: Stiamo decorando il balcone con le luci a filo.
translations.ko: 지금 발코니에 전구줄을 달아 꾸미고 있어요.
translations.yue: 我哋用燈串嚟佈置露台。
translations.pt: Estamos decorando a varanda com cordões de luzes.
translations.he: אנחנו מקשטים את המרפסת בשרשראות אורות.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang trang trí ban công bằng đèn dây.
translations.nl: We versieren het balkon met lichtslingers.
translations.hi: हम रोशनी की लड़ियों से बालकनी सजा रहे हैं।
translations.el: Διακοσμούμε το μπαλκόνι με φωτεινές γιρλάντες.
translations.id: Kami menghias balkon dengan lampu hias tali.
translations.ro: Decorăm balconul cu șiruri de lumini.
translations.ja: バルコニーにイルミネーションを飾っています。
